instagram_caption:
Week 4 is live: Week 4 Pre-Draw Edition

Pre-draw edition for 20-26 April 2026 . Week 4 sits in the transition zone after the previous clay swing and before the next bracket fully sharpens, so the edge is less about forcing certainty and more about preparing for a board that will clarify when the official draw lands . The early fantasy angle is to track elite workload, clay-specific form carryover, and any ranking-driven pricing gaps before the slate locks into focus.

Bonus Ball board: Jannik Sinner, Carlos Alcaraz, Alexander Zverev.
